arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford drops fresh Manchester United transfer statement amid Arsenal link
arts.sum: On Wednesday, hours after it opened, Rashford was forced to release a statement, slamming reports over talks with a new agency - the same one which landed Gareth Bale's move to Real Madrid. And last month, the attacker also revealed that he's "ready for a new challenge" - after being left out of the squad for the Manchester derby against Manchester City.

arts.sum: The Gunners are looking to keep pressure on Liverpool, who are nine points ahead

arts.ttl: Arsenal eye blockbuster move for Chelsea outcast
arts.sum: The Chelsea attacker is said to be unhappy at Stamford Bridge due to his limited minutes in meaningful Premier League fixtures. Arsenal have entered the race to sign Christopher Nkunku, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Arsenal drop crucial Marcus Rashford transfer clue as Man Utd plot shock Jadon Sancho 'trick'
arts.sum: Then, after the Manchester derby last month – which United won 2-1 – Rashford all but confirmed that he wants to leave in the January transfer window . The 27-year-old forward faces an uncertain future at Manchester United after claiming he's 'ready for a new challenge'.

arts.ttl: Arsenal ‘at the front row’ for striker – Big competition for player as salary terms emerge
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain’s Randal Kolo Muani could depart the French giants in the January transfer window and it seems Arsenal have joined the race for the striker. The situation of the France international has been reported by Italian media outlet TuttoSport. arts.ttl: Arsenal January transfer targets assessed: Arda Guler move, Randal Kolo Muani interest, Fabio Vieira recall?
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts speaks to Sports Mole about the Gunners' January transfer window plans, including reported interest in Arda Guler and Randal Kolo Muani.

arts.ttl: Arsenal confirm first January transfer as defender deal announced
arts.sum: The defender has now joined Wigan in a permanent deal, though, with the Latics currently 16th in League One. In a statement Arsenal said: "We thank Josh for his contribution to the club during his time with us and wish him all the best for his next chapter with Wigan Athletic. Arsenal have confirmed Josh Robinson has left the club to join League One side Wigan Athletic in a permanent transfer.

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney to Celtic transfer clue left hiding in plain sight by Mikel Arteta as Arsenal exit door thrown wide open
arts.sum: The left-back is inching closer to an Arsenal exit with his contract up next summer
